name: Paella (Spanish Chicken, Seafood Casserole)
recipeIngredient: 4 lb Chicken, boneless and skinless, cut into serving-size pieces
1 lb Shrimp, whole and peeled, raw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell, devein, and butterfly the shrimp.
2. Scrub mussels and clams, then soak them in several changes of water until ready to use.
3. Cut Chinese sausage into thin diagonal slices and steam for 15 minutes.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. In a bowl, combine chicken pieces with chili sauce and 2 tablespoons of sake. Set aside.
6. In another bowl, mix shrimp with 1 tablespoon of soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of sake. Set aside.
7. Dissolve saffron in some chicken stock and set aside.
8. Heat olive oil (1/4 cup) in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Add chicken pieces, few at a time, and cook until browned on each side. Remove and set aside once all are browned.
10. Pour off excess fat from the skillet.
11. Add remaining olive oil, garlic, and gingerroot. Cook for 1 minute, then add green onions and cook for an additional 30 seconds.
12. Add steamed sausage and cook for another minute.
13. Stir in rice and coat evenly with the oil mixture.
14. Pour in chicken stock, dissolved saffron, remaining tablespoon of sake, and remaining tablespoon of soy sauce. Bring to a boil and simmer over medium heat for 10 minutes.
15. Add snow peas, shrimp, and chicken pieces. Cover with the rice mixture.
16. Arrange clams and mussels on top, ensuring they are elevated so they can open during cooking.
17. Bake uncovered at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes or until clams and mussels have opened.
18. Sprinkle cilantro over the top and serve alongside a green salad and crusty bread.
